action.reasoning: Observation: Two evals at 0.0 success. Training data shows actions are normalized LIBERO deltas with strong correlation to state changes. Pi0 base outputs don't match VLABench conventions. Analysis: Need to compute denormalization stats and fix action bridge. Also need to understand if Pi0 outputs are in the same normalized space as training data. Decision: Compute denormalization stats, create a proper action bridge, and submit eval. Also prepare LoRA fine-tuning.
